auth.pleaseSignIn: Please sign in to view your {{resource}}

dashboard.overview: Here's an overview of your finances
dashboard.noLedgersYet: No ledgers yet. Create your first ledger to get started.
dashboard.welcomeDescription: Please sign in to manage your personal finances
dashboard.welcomeText: Track your income, expenses, and manage multiple ledgers with double-entry bookkeeping.

ledgers.title: Ledgers
ledgers.subtitle: Manage your financial ledgers
ledgers.createNew: Create a new ledger to start tracking
ledgers.createDescription: Add a new financial ledger to your collection
ledgers.noLedgersDescription: Create your first ledger to start tracking your finances
ledgers.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this ledger?

accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.subtitle: Manage accounts within your ledgers
accounts.createDescription: Add a new account to your ledger
accounts.noAccountsDescription: Create your first account to start tracking
accounts.selectLedgerDescription: Select a ledger above to view its accounts
accounts.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this account?
accounts.confirmDeleteWithChildren: Are you sure you want to delete this account and its {{count}} child account(s)?
accounts.cannotDeleteWithTransactions: Cannot delete this account because it or one of its child accounts has associated transactions. Please delete the transactions first.
accounts.deleteFailed: Failed to delete account. Please try again.

transactions.title: Transactions
transactions.subtitle: View and manage your financial transactions
transactions.createDescription: Create a new double-entry transaction. Debits must equal credits.
transactions.editDescription: Update the transaction. Debits must equal credits.
transactions.noTransactionsDescription: Create your first transaction to track your finances
transactions.selectLedgerDescription: Select a ledger above to view its transactions
transactions.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this transaction?
transactions.notBalanced: Transaction is not balanced. Debits ({{debits}}) must equal credits ({{credits}}).

accountTransactions.title: Transactions for {{name}}
accountTransactions.subtitle: Showing all transactions involving this account

exchangeRates.title: Exchange Rates
exchangeRates.ratesDescription: Historical exchange rates from manual entries and external APIs
exchangeRates.noRatesDescription: Exchange rates will appear here when you create transactions with different currencies
exchangeRates.createRateDescription: Add a manual exchange rate for currency conversion
exchangeRates.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this exchange rate?

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account settings
settings.signInToView: Sign in to view your settings

instruments.title: Instruments
instruments.createDescription: Add a new financial instrument to track
instruments.noInstrumentsDescription: Create your first instrument to start tracking investments
instruments.listDescription: Financial instruments registered in this ledger
instruments.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this instrument?

instrumentPrices.title: Instrument Prices
instrumentPrices.createDescription: Add a price entry for an instrument
instrumentPrices.noPricesDescription: Add price entries to track your portfolio value
instrumentPrices.listDescription: Price history for instruments in this ledger
instrumentPrices.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this price?

portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.description: View your investment positions and performance
portfolio.noPositionsDescription: Create transactions with instruments to see your positions here
portfolio.addPrices: Add instrument prices to see performance

errors.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
